src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Remove the user registration endpoint as it is no longer part of this controller's responsibility.
Add a login endpoint that returns a JWT token in the response headers.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.human_impl: @PostMapping("/login") public ResponseEntity<Void> login(@RequestBody LoginRequest loginRequest) { ... return new ResponseEntity<>(httpHeaders, HttpStatus.OK); }

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Add a logout endpoint to invalidate the current token.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.human_impl: @PostMapping("/logout") public ResponseEntity<Void> logout() { authService.removeToken(); return new ResponseEntity<>(HttpStatus.OK); }

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
Rename findByUsername to findByUserName to align with the entity field name 'userName'.
Refactor saveUser to accept UserRegisterRequest DTO and return void.
Update save logic to use DTO conversion, transactional annotation, and role assignment.
Refactor findUserByUserName to accept String and return User directly.
Update find logic to use custom UserNameNotFoundException.
Add update method to modify user details conditionally.
Add delete method to remove user by username.
Refactor getAllUser to return Page of UserRepresentation DTOs.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.human_impl: public Page<UserRepresentation> getAll(int pageNum, int pageSize)

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update getAll logic to map User entities to UserRepresentation DTOs.
Add check method to verify password matches.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.human_impl: public boolean check(String currentPassword, String password)

src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the newer testing framework.
Replace the JUnit 4 runner with the JUnit 5 extension mechanism for Spring context loading.
Update Spring Test imports to use the JUnit 5 specific extension class instead of the JUnit 4 runner.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.8 to 3.5.0 to align with Java 21 ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version from 1.8 to 21.
Replace legacy MySQL connector with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j artifact required for newer Spring Boot versions.
Set Maven compiler source level to the project's Java version.
Set Maven compiler target level to the project's Java version.
